name: RiskCube
long_description:
RiskCube is built for startups and growing businesses that need vendor-ready insurance to sell into larger customers, pass procurement, and move faster through onboarding.
We compare options from top-rated U.S. carriers using AI agents and licensed broker review, then get founders the coverage and Certificates of Insurance (COIs) they need to close enterprise deals.

We offer D&O, Tech E&O, Cyber Liability, or General Liability coverage. Instead of weeks of back-and-forth with traditional brokers, we assess your unique risk profile, scan top-rated carriers, and present the options that satisfy your vendor requirements with proof of coverage.

We serve AI/SaaS, Fintech, Biotech, and Web3 companies across the U.S. CA Licensed.
